tasks.name: Request a monthly lawn mowing quote for a small yard under $120/month
tasks.description: Find an ongoing lawn mowing service suitable for a property up to 1/4 acre, limited to a maximum price of $120 per month, select the highest-rated option, and submit a quote request form with specific contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Services” option in the main navigation menu.
From the services list, click on “Lawn Care & Maintenance.”
In the service type filter section, select the checkbox for “Ongoing Lawn Mowing.”
In the property size dropdown, choose the option labeled “Up to 1/4 acre.”
In the price filter area, type “120” into the maximum monthly price field and apply the filter.
Open the sort options dropdown and select “Customer Rating: High to Low.”
Click on the first lawn mowing plan in the sorted results list (the highest-rated plan under $120/month).
On the plan details page, click the button labeled “Request Monthly Quote.”

On the quote request form, enter the name “Alex Johnson,” type the street address “45 Maple Street,” enter ZIP code “12345,” type phone number “555-0101,” select “Phone call” as the preferred contact method, and click the “Submit Quote Request” button.

tasks.name: Book a one-time spring yard cleanup on the 15th at or after 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Use the online booking system to schedule a one-time spring cleanup service on the 15th of the current month, choosing the first available time slot starting at or after 3:00 PM, and complete the booking with pay-on-site selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Book Now” or “Schedule Service” button in the header.
On the booking page, open the service category dropdown and select “Seasonal Cleanups.”
From the list of seasonal services, click on “Spring Yard Cleanup (One-Time).”
In the date picker, select the 15th of the current month as the service date.
In the time slot selector, locate the first available time that starts at or after 3:00 PM and select that time slot.
On the customer information section, type the name “Jamie Lee,” enter the address “210 Oak Avenue,” and type ZIP code “60610.”
Enter the phone number “555-0202” and the email address “jamie@example.com” in the corresponding fields.
In the payment options area, select the option labeled “Pay on site” or “Pay after service.”
Click the button labeled “Confirm Booking” or “Complete Reservation” to finalize the spring cleanup appointment.

tasks.name: Create a custom landscaping package with exactly 3 services under $400 total
tasks.description: Build a custom package by adding lawn mowing, hedge trimming, and flower bed mulching to a package builder, adjusting frequencies so that the estimated total is between $300 and $400, and proceed to the package review page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Packages” or “Custom Plan Builder” option in the main navigation.
On the package builder page, find the “Add Service” section and search within the list to locate “Lawn Mowing.”
Add “Lawn Mowing” to the package and set its frequency dropdown to “Every 2 weeks.”
Use the “Add Service” section again to add “Hedge Trimming” and set its frequency to “Once per month.”
Add a third service by selecting “Flower Bed Mulching” from the list and set its frequency to “One-time.”

Look at the estimated package total displayed on the builder page; if it is over $400, reduce the Lawn Mowing frequency from “Every 2 weeks” to “Once per month,” and if it is under $300, increase the Hedge Trimming frequency from “Once per month” to “Every 2 weeks.”

Confirm that the package includes exactly three services: Lawn Mowing, Hedge Trimming, and Flower Bed Mulching, and that the builder’s estimated total is between $300 and $400 according to the on-page estimate.
Click the “Review Package” or “Continue to Summary” button to go to the package review page.
On the review page, click the “Save Package” or “Proceed” button to save the custom package configuration for checkout.

tasks.name: Choose the best residential maintenance plan with mowing and leaf removal under $150/month
tasks.description: Compare residential maintenance plans that include both lawn mowing and leaf removal, cost no more than $150 per month, and select the plan that offers more visits per month before proceeding to the checkout page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Maintenance Plans” option in the main navigation menu.
On the maintenance plans page, select the “Residential” tab or filter option.
In the price filter area, set the maximum monthly price field to “150” and apply the filter.
Use the feature filters or checkboxes to select options for “Lawn Mowing” and “Leaf Removal” so only plans that include both features are shown.

From the filtered list, open the first two plan detail pages in sequence by clicking on their names (open one, then go back and open the next), and note the “visits per month” count shown in each plan’s features table.
Determine which of these two plans lists a higher number of visits per month in its features, then return to the maintenance plans list and click on that higher-visit plan’s name.
On the selected plan’s detail page, click the “Select Plan” or “Choose This Plan” button.
When asked for billing frequency, choose the “Monthly” billing option from the dropdown or radio buttons.
Click the “Go to Checkout” or “Continue” button to move to the checkout page with the selected maintenance plan.

tasks.name: Request a consultation for a drought-tolerant front yard installation rated 4+ stars between $200–$600
tasks.description: Use search and filters to find a front yard drought-tolerant landscaping service with a customer rating of at least 4 stars and a price between $200 and $600, select the top-rated option, and submit a consultation request form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header and type “drought tolerant front yard installation.”
Press Enter or click the search icon to view search results.
On the results page, use the rating filter to select only services with a rating of “4 stars & up.”
Use the price range controls to set the minimum price to “200” and the maximum price to “600,” then apply the price filter.
Open the sort dropdown and choose “Rating: High to Low” to prioritize the best-rated services.
Click on the first service card in the filtered and sorted results list.
On the service detail page, click the button labeled “Request Consultation” or “Book Consultation.”
In the consultation form, type the name “Morgan Rivera,” enter the address “88 Pine Street,” and type ZIP code “90210.”

Select the preferred time-of-day option “Morning (8am–12pm)” from the dropdown, type the note “Interested in a drought-tolerant design for the front yard only” in the message field, and click the “Submit Request” button.

tasks.name: Apply a 10% first-time customer promo code to a one-time lawn mowing service
tasks.description: Locate the first-time customer promotion offering 10% off, copy the promo code, add a 'Lawn Mowing - One-Time Visit' service to the cart, apply the promo code in the cart, and proceed to the payment step of checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Special Offers” or “Promotions” link in the main navigation or footer.
On the promotions page, locate the offer labeled “10% off for first-time customers” and identify the promo code text shown, such as “GREEN10.”
Use the on-page “Copy Code” button or manually select and copy the promo code text (for example, “GREEN10”) to your clipboard.
Navigate to the “Services” section using the main navigation, then click on “Lawn Care & Maintenance.”
From the list of services, click the item named exactly “Lawn Mowing - One-Time Visit.”
On the service detail page, click the “Add to Cart” button.
Click the cart icon in the header and then click the “View Cart” or “Go to Cart” button to open the cart page.
In the promo code or coupon field on the cart page, paste or type the promo code you copied (for example, “GREEN10”) and click the “Apply” button.
After applying the promo code, click the “Proceed to Checkout” or “Continue to Payment” button to reach the checkout step where payment options are displayed.

tasks.name: Save a backyard patio with fire pit project to favorites and request a similar design
tasks.description: Use the project gallery to filter for medium-sized backyard patio projects that include a fire pit, add the third resulting project to favorites, and submit a design request form referencing the project’s ID.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Gallery” or “Our Work” link in the main navigation.
On the gallery page, use the space type filter to select “Backyard” and use the feature filter to select “Patio” and “Fire Pit.”
Use the yard size filter or dropdown to select “Medium (1/4–1/2 acre)” as the project size.
Scroll through the filtered gallery results and click on the third project thumbnail in the list.
On the project detail page, click the “Add to Favorites” or heart-shaped button to save this project to your favorites.
Locate the project ID or reference code displayed on the project detail page (for example, “Project ID: BP-204”), and click the “Request a Similar Design” or “Request Quote for This Style” button.
In the request form, enter the name “Taylor Morgan,” type email “taylor@example.com,” and type ZIP code “94110.”
In the message or project reference field, type a message that includes the project ID exactly as shown (for example, “I would like a design similar to Project ID: BP-204 for my backyard.”).
Select “Backyard Patio with Fire Pit” from any available project type dropdown and click the “Submit Request” button.

tasks.name: Ask about service availability for ZIP 60610 and cancellation policy via contact form
tasks.description: Use the FAQ section to find information on service areas and cancellation policy, then submit a contact form asking whether services are available in ZIP 60610 and how the cancellation policy applies there.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Help,” “Support,” or “FAQ” link in the header or footer to open the FAQ section.
In the FAQ search bar, type “service area” and press Enter to see related articles.
Click on the FAQ article that mentions “Service Areas” or “Where do you operate?” and scroll through the article to view the list or description of covered ZIP codes.
Use the FAQ search bar again to type “cancellation” and press Enter, then click on the article that describes the “Cancellation Policy.”
Scroll through the cancellation policy article to read the details regarding how cancellations are handled for scheduled services.
Use the main navigation or footer to click on the “Contact Us” link and open the contact form page.
On the contact form, select “Service Availability” or “General Question” as the subject from the subject dropdown.
Fill in the name field with “Jordan Smith,” enter the email address “jordan@example.com,” and type the phone number “555-0303.”

In the message field, type: “I live in ZIP code 60610. Can you confirm if you provide services in this area, and how your cancellation policy would apply to bookings in ZIP 60610?” then click the “Send Message” or “Submit” button.
